seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Ubon Ratchathani 2026 — Budget to Luxury Near City Center & Mekong
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Ubon Ratchathani for every budget. From riverside guesthouses to business hotels and resort stays. Real prices in THB, honest reviews, and tips for Candle Festival bookings.

intro: Ubon Ratchathani's hotel scene is compact but well-rounded — the city center hosts the main business hotels within walking or tuk-tuk distance of the Thung Si Mueang Park, temples, and night markets. Budget guesthouses cluster around the bus and train station areas. Mid-range travelers find excellent value at local chain hotels. During the Candle Festival in July, every hotel in the city sells out weeks in advance — book 3-4 months ahead or you'll be driving to Phibun Mangsahan for a room. Here are 10 hotels across all budgets — every one a real property with real prices.

hotels.name: Sri Isaan Hotel
hotels.description: A clean and reliable budget hotel near the main bus terminal area on Phadaeng Road, popular with Thai business travelers and backpackers passing through. Simple air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms, hot water, and cable TV. The location puts you within 10 minutes' walk of the night market and a 150 THB tuk-tuk ride to Thung Si Mueang Park. Genuinely local atmosphere with Thai guests in the majority.
highlights: Affordable clean rooms with AC and private bathroom
Walking distance to Ratchabut Road night market
Close to the main bus terminal for early departures

hotels.name: Rayang Guesthouse
hotels.description: A friendly family-run guesthouse on a quiet soi off Suriyat Road, popular with long-term travelers and volunteers based in Ubon. Offers both fan and air-conditioned rooms, a small common area with local travel information, and owners who speak enough English to help with day-trip planning. Bicycles available for hire (50-100 THB/day). The alms-giving procession on Suriyat Road passes within 50 meters every morning.
highlights: Family-run with genuine local knowledge about the area
Bicycle hire on-site for city exploration
Walking distance to Suriyat Road alms-giving and morning markets

hotels.name: Tohsang Khongjiam Resort
hotels.area: Khong Chiam (70 km east of Ubon city)
hotels.description: A riverside resort in Khong Chiam village sitting on a bluff above the Mekong River, making it the ideal base for exploring Pha Taem, Sam Phan Bok, and the two-color river without the 70 km daily commute from Ubon city. Bungalow-style rooms with river views, a garden restaurant serving Mekong river fish, and direct riverside access. Basic facilities but exceptional Mekong views. Staying in Khong Chiam lets you watch sunrise over the Mekong from your room.
highlights: Mekong River views from bungalow-style rooms
Walking distance to the two-color river viewpoint
On-site restaurant with fresh Mekong river fish

hotels.name: Ratchathani Hotel
hotels.description: A well-established mid-range hotel on Kheuan Thani Road, one of Ubon's main commercial streets. Clean, spacious rooms with reliable AC, hot water, and free Wi-Fi. The hotel has an on-site restaurant serving both Thai and Western breakfast. Central location within walking distance of the Ubon Ratchathani National Museum, Thung Si Mueang Park (1 km), and several temple-viewing routes. Popular with Thai families and domestic business travelers.
highlights: Central location close to main temples and Thung Si Mueang Park
On-site restaurant for convenient breakfast
Spacious rooms at good value for the location

hotels.name: Sunee Grand Hotel
hotels.description: One of Ubon's most popular mid-range hotels, located near the main commercial area on Jaeng Sanit Road. Comfortable rooms with flat-screen TVs, minibar, and modern bathrooms. The hotel has a fitness center, coffee shop, and an on-site restaurant. Business-oriented but equally suited to leisure travelers. The location is central for accessing temples, the national museum, and the night market by tuk-tuk.
highlights: Fitness center and coffee shop on-site
Modern rooms with reliable AC and Wi-Fi
Central location with easy tuk-tuk access to all major sights

hotels.name: Rapeepan Ville Hotel
hotels.description: A consistently well-reviewed mid-range hotel positioned conveniently near shopping areas and the Ratchabut Road night market. Buffet breakfast and dinner service on-site, comfortable rooms with good insulation from street noise, and helpful staff who speak workable English. The hotel is popular during the Candle Festival period — book 3-4 months ahead for July dates. Room rates are genuinely good value for the standard.
highlights: Buffet breakfast and dinner available on-site
Near Ratchabut Road night market and shopping areas
Good English-speaking staff for trip planning assistance

hotels.name: Centara Ubon
hotels.description: The Centara group's Ubon property brings Thai chain-hotel reliability and service standards to the city. Located on Chaiyangkun Road — the main arterial road through the city — with easy access to all areas by tuk-tuk or Grab. Comfortable, modern rooms with good sound insulation, a swimming pool, fitness center, and a restaurant. The Centara brand means consistent quality, loyalty points for frequent travelers, and multilingual staff. The city's best mid-range option for travelers who want brand-standard comfort.
highlights: Swimming pool and fitness center — rare at this price in Ubon
Centara brand quality with multilingual reception
Convenient location on Chaiyangkun Road with easy city access

hotels.name: Nakhon Luang Hotel
hotels.area: City Center (near Thung Si Mueang Park)
hotels.description: A well-positioned mid-range hotel within walking distance of Thung Si Mueang Park — the Candle Festival venue and center of Ubon's cultural life. During the festival, guests can walk to the parade route in 5 minutes. Rooms are clean and comfortable with the expected mid-range amenities. The hotel's location near the park means it's also convenient for the National Museum and temple circuit. On-site parking for travelers who've rented a car for day trips.
highlights: 5-minute walk to Thung Si Mueang Park and Candle Festival venue
Walking distance to Wat Phra That Nong Bua and National Museum
On-site parking for day-trip car renters

hotels.name: Laithong Hotel
hotels.description: Ubon Ratchathani's most refined city-center hotel, offering the closest thing to luxury in a city that skews towards business-practical accommodation. Large, well-appointed rooms with premium bedding, a well-equipped gym, and the city's best hotel restaurant serving a mix of Thai and international cuisine. The rooftop terrace has views over the provincial capital. Popular with government officials, visiting dignitaries, and Thai corporates — delivers a notch above other Ubon hotels on service and finish.
highlights: Best hotel restaurant in Ubon Ratchathani city
Rooftop terrace with city views
Premium bedding and well-maintained facilities at the highest standard in the city

hotels.name: Puripunn Baby Grand Boutique Hotel (Chiang Mai-standard concept, Ubon location)
hotels.area: City Outskirts (Warin Chamrap district, south of center)
hotels.description: A boutique property in the Warin Chamrap district — the quieter south bank of the Mun River — offering a genuine retreat from Ubon's city bustle. The hotel features pool villas and larger suites with private plunge pools or garden access, a spa, and personalized service that the larger business hotels cannot match. The setting is greener and quieter than the city center while remaining 15 minutes from the main sights by Grab. For travelers who want genuine Thai hospitality at the highest local level.
highlights: Pool villas with private plunge pools in a quiet south-bank setting
Spa and personalized boutique service
Green residential setting 15 min from city center by Grab

bookingTips: Book accommodation 3-4 months in advance for Candle Festival week (typically first week of July) — the entire city sells out and there are no alternatives within 50 km
The city center area around Thung Si Mueang Park is the best base for festival week — you can walk to the parade route
Consider staying in Khong Chiam (Tohsang Resort or similar) if Pha Taem and Sam Phan Bok are your main goals — the 70 km commute from Ubon city each day adds up
Centara Ubon is the safest choice for business travelers or those who want brand-standard reliability
Low season (June-October, excluding festival week) sees discounts of 20-40% across all hotel categories
Grab operates in Ubon city — use it from the airport to city center (150-200 THB, 20 minutes) instead of fixed-rate airport taxis
